data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding minimum purchase requirements.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Minimum purchase requirements' but does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The evidence does not include any details or endpoints that verify the existence or functionality of minimum purchase requirements, leading to an inconclusive status. Without this critical information, it is impossible to assert whether the requirement is met or not.
gaps: No evidence of minimum purchase requirements.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the minimum purchase requirements.
